findings.description: The JSP implementation example for BLOB column download is omitted. The source shows a non-trivial pattern using c:forEach with varStatus.index for unique element naming and n:param for passing the fileId to identify the selected record. The knowledge file only states the concept textually ('param タグでパラメータを設定する') without showing the concrete loop structure.
findings.source_evidence:
<c:forEach var="record" items="${records}" varStatus="status">
    <n:set var="fileId" name="record.fileId" />
    <n:downloadLink uri="..." name="blobColumn_${status.index}">
        <n:write name="record.fileName" />(<n:write name="fileId" />)
        <n:param paramName="fileId" name="fileId" />
    </n:downloadLink>
</c:forEach>

findings.description: The full JavaScript implementation of the doOnclick function is omitted. The source provides complete cross-browser code with three branches (IE: fireEvent, standard: createEvent/dispatchEvent, fallback: onclick). The knowledge file only summarizes it as 'IE/非IE対応' without the actual implementable code.

The download window JSP in the knowledge file omits <n:errors filter="global" />, which is present in the source. This element handles display of global error messages in the popup window and is a functional part of the template.
findings.source_evidence: ダウンロードを開始します。
